narrative:
German Township has 5,269 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
